raw.official description: Pharah can move while Barrage is active.
raw.ability details:
* ''Integrated into base kit in Reign of Talon Season 2.''
* Pharah can descend with Crouch and rise with Jump. This does not consume Hover Jets fuel.
* Pharah additionally receives the move speed penalty from moving backwards or diagonally backwards.

raw.official description: Jet Dash grants 50% fuel. Maximum overfuel is increased by 100%.
Convert 125 health to shields. Direct hits with the Rocket Launcher triggers passive shield regeneration.

abilities.name: Sky Spy

raw.official description: Concussive Blast reveals targets to Pharah for 3 seconds. During this, the next direct Rocket Launcher hit per target deals 30% extra damage.
raw.ability details:

* Heroes remain revealed until the end of the duration even if the mark is triggered.

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Fly rapidly upwards. Grants some fuel.
raw.ability details:
* Restores 50% of Hover Jets fuel over 0.9 seconds and can temporarily overfill the maximum fuel amount.
* Getting stunned does not interrupt the ability after it has been activated.
* Jump Jet movement is influenced by diretional inputs.

raw.official description: Launch an explosive blast to knock back enemies.
raw.cast time: 0.16 + 0.50 seconds
raw.ability details: * Also [[knockback|knocks back]] Pharah herself, without dealing damage. * Mostly deals horizontal knockback. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the explosion is unaffected. * Destroys fences and other breakables in the explosion area.

abilities.name: Hover Jets

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.duration:
Up to 2 seconds (continuous flight)
0.3 seconds (energy regen delay)
raw.ability details:
* Activated by holding jump button while in the air.
* Allows Pharah to gain height when held.
* Refuels 45% per second automatically while on ground, excluding the regen delay, takes 2.22 seconds to refill from empty to full.
* Hover Jets' [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

duration.raw:
Up to 2 seconds (continuous flight)
0.3 seconds (energy regen delay)

abilities.name: Rocket Launcher
shot_type: [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.damage:
40 (direct hit)
80 – 24.6 (splash, enemy)
20 – 6.15 (splash, self)
raw.reload time: 1.5 seconds animation
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 150 while firing (114 overall w/reload) * Fire recovery stops while using melee * Explosive Damage and knockback decreases with distance from the explosion, reaching 0% at the edge of the blast radius. * Explosive Damage and knockback also apply to self. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the explosion is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

reload_time.raw: 1.5 seconds animation

abilities.name: Barrage
shot_type: [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Hover in place and launch a continuous volley of mini-rockets.
raw.damage:
10 (direct hit)
25 – 7.5 (splash, enemy)
12.5 – 3.75 (splash, self)
raw.fire rate: 30 rockets per second
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 1050 ** A total of 562.5 - 2625 damage can be dealt to enemies using the ultimate. ** A total of 281.25 - 937.5 self-damage can be dealt through the ultimate. * Barrage is a [[channeled]] ability; while it is active Pharah cannot use other abilities and becoming [[stunned]], [[knocked down]] or [[hacked]] immediately ends the ability, consuming the [[ultimate charge]]. * Pharah remains stationary while the ability is active, but can turn. * Pharah will stay in the air if the ability is used mid-air. * Refills Hover Jets' fuel and restores Rocket Launcher ammo instantly upon activation. * Each Barrage has a fixed spread pattern and the spread pattern used is based on the Barrages order in the match (Barrage 1, Barrage 2, Barrage 3, etc.). * The spread eventually fizzles out to 8 degrees at the ultimates max range, but the closer you are to the surface you’re aiming at, the more pronounced the initial unorthodox trajectories of the rockets, which leads to most of the rockets landing outside the 8 degrees radius you would expect them to hit. * The projectiles can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the explosion is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

12.5 – 3.75 (splash, self)
